message:
feat(storage): tick 136 event-annotation cluster cx-first siblings (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Fifteenth sibling-expansion tick. Adds 7 new storage `_with_cx` siblings
for the event-annotation cluster, resuming the direct sweep after the
caller-migration phase saturated on tracked files.

New siblings:
- mark_event_handled_with_cx (write path)
- set_event_triage_state_with_cx (write path)
- set_event_note_with_cx (write path)
- add_event_label_with_cx (write path)
- remove_event_label_with_cx (write path)
- add_event_mute_with_cx (write path)
- get_event_identity_key_with_cx (read path)

Each sibling does a pre-flight `cx.checkpoint()?` for cancellation
budget honouring, then delegates to the unchanged legacy impl.

Test: `storage_tick136_event_annotation_cluster_roundtrip` seeds
a pane + event, then exercises all 7 new siblings end-to-end against
a fresh SQLite DB. Verified via fork bypass: 483/483 storage:: tests
pass.

Storage cx-first coverage: 63 + 7 = 70 siblings across 140 legacy
pub async fns. 70 legacy methods still lack a sibling; event cluster
now fully covered.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
